daily_pick.title: Don't Retrieve, Navigate: Distilling Enterprise Knowledge into Navigable Agent Skills for QA and RAG
daily_pick.summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) grounds LLM responses in external evidence but treats the model as a passive consumer of search results: it never sees how the corpus is organized or what it has not yet retrieved, limiting its ability to backtrack or combine scattered evidence. We present Corpus2Skill, which distills a document corpus into a hierarchical skill directory offline and lets an LLM agent navigate it at serve time. The compilation pipeline iteratively clusters documents, generates
daily_pick.cn_title: 不要检索，要导航：将企业知识蒸馏为用于问答和检索增强生成的可导航智能体技能
daily_pick.cn_summary: 检索增强生成（RAG）能够将大语言模型（LLM）的响应建立在外部证据之上，但存在根本性局限：模型被视为搜索结果的被动接收者，无法了解语料库的组织结构或尚未检索到的内容，从而限制了回溯和整合分散证据的能力。我们提出Corpus2Skill方法，将文档语料库离线编译为层级技能目录，使LLM代理在服务时能够主动导航该目录。该编译流程通过迭代聚类文档、生成技能描述并评估其效用，逐步构建可导航的知识结构。这

hot_articles.title: 高德发布全球首个面向AGI的全栈具身技术体系“ABot”
hot_articles.summary: 4月19日，在2026北京亦庄机器人半程马拉松上，阿里巴巴旗下高德正式公开全球首款开放环境全自主具身机器人“高德途途”。这款四足机器人协助视障人士完成复杂避障、人群穿行等实战挑战。其底层依托高德发布的ABot具身技术体系，基于上万种真实场景与千万级多模态数据构建。目前，高德ABot系列模型已经在全球15项基准测试中拿到SOTA。

hot_articles.title: Hitch Open联合智元发起全球首个AI自主决策机器人乒乓球赛事
hot_articles.summary: 4 月 17 日，在2026年智元合作伙伴大会（APC 2026）具身智能教育生态分论坛，Hitch Open联合智元发起全球首个AI自主决策机器人乒乓球赛事，成为国内首家深度合作该国际开放竞技平台的具身智能头部企业。HOPE AI挑战赛，全称 Hitch Open Ping-Pong Embodiment AI 挑战赛，是Hitch Open世界AI竞速锦标赛2026赛季推出的全新旗舰赛项，也是

hot_articles.title: 河南省脑机接口康复设备技术创新中心揭牌
hot_articles.summary: 4月18日，河南省脑机接口康复设备技术创新中心正式揭牌。这是国内率先获批建设的省级脑机接口技术创新平台，由翔宇医疗牵头，联合郑州大学、郑州大学第一附属医院共建。中心成立后，将重点攻克脑电信号高精度解码、多模态人机交互等关键技术，填补国内相关领域多项空白，推动脑机接口康复技术从实验室走向临床、惠及患者。（证券时报）

hot_articles.title: C3安全大会成立多项AI安全生态联盟，华为、阿里云、ABB等参与
hot_articles.summary: 4月18日，在第八届C3安全大会上，多家领军企业联合发起多个产业联盟。华为与亚信安全共同成立“鸿蒙安全实验室”，旨在构建面向鸿蒙生态的全栈式终端安全防护体系。此外，“智能体原生安全产业共同体”“Physical AI联盟”以及“天枢卫星互联网与空间计算安全联合实验室”也同步启动，参与方包括阿里云、ABB机器人、德勤、电子科技大学等。各方将围绕智能体安全、物理AI规模化落地及卫星互联网安全等方向开展

hot_articles.title: Cursor 3 推出智能体优先界面，突破传统 IDE 模式
hot_articles.summary: Anysphere 最近发布了 Cursor 3"，对其 AI 编程工具进行了全面重构。新版本将核心交互模式从文件编辑转向对并行编码智能体的管理。界面为全新设计，并非基于 Cursor 现有的 VS Code 分支扩展而来，不过用户可随时切换回完整 IDE 模式。Cursor 3 的核心理念是：开发者应将更多时间用于编排智能体，而非直接编辑代码，工具设计也应贴合这一现状。联合创始人 Michael

hot_articles.title: AI 写代码太快，人类测试跟不上了，Meta 用新方法把 bug 检出率提升 4 倍
hot_articles.summary: Meta 报告称，通过一种即时（Just-in-Time，JiT）测试方法"提升了软件质量。该方法在代码评审期间动态生成测试，而不是依赖长期存在、需要人工维护的测试套件。根据 Meta 的工程博客及相关研究，这一方法在 AI 辅助开发环境中将缺陷检测能力提升了约 4 倍。这一转变源于代理式工作流的兴起，在这种工作流中，AI 系统越来越多地生成或修改大段代码。在这种环境下，传统测试套件面临更高的维护

arxiv_papers.title: Generalization in LLM Problem Solving: The Case of the Shortest Path
arxiv_papers.summary: Whether language models can systematically generalize remains actively debated. Yet empirical performance is jointly shaped by multiple factors such as training data, training paradigms, and inference-time strategies, making failures difficult to interpret. We introduce a controlled synthetic environment based on shortest-path planning, a canonical composable sequential optimization problem. The setup enables clean separation of these factors and supports two orthogonal axes of generalization: s
arxiv_papers.cn_title: 大型语言模型问题求解中的泛化：以最短路径为例
arxiv_papers.cn_summary: 语言模型能否实现系统性泛化一直是活跃的争论话题。然而，经验性能同时受训练数据、训练范式和推理时策略等多重因素影响，导致失败难以解释。我们引入了一个基于最短路径规划的受控合成环境，这是一个典型的可组合顺序优化问题。该设置能够清晰分离这些因素，并支持两个正交的泛化维度：规模和结构。通过在该环境中进行系统性实验，我们能够深入分析语言模型的泛化能力，揭示其在不同训练条件和推理策略下的表现规律。

arxiv_papers.title: One-shot learning for the complex dynamical behaviors of weakly nonlinear forced oscillators
arxiv_papers.summary: Extrapolative prediction of complex nonlinear dynamics remains a central challenge in engineering. This study proposes a one-shot learning method to identify global frequency-response curves from a single excitation time history by learning governing equations. We introduce MEv-SINDy (Multi-frequency Evolutionary Sparse Identification of Nonlinear Dynamics) to infer the governing equations of non-autonomous and multi-frequency systems. The methodology leverages the Generalized Harmonic Balance (
arxiv_papers.cn_title: 弱非线性受迫振子复杂动力学行为的一次学习
arxiv_papers.cn_summary: 复杂非线性动力学的外推预测仍是工程领域的核心挑战。本研究提出一种单次学习方法，通过学习控制方程从单一激励时程中识别全局频率响应曲线。我们引

arxiv_papers.title: APEX-MEM: Agentic Semi-Structured Memory with Temporal Reasoning for Long-Term Conversational AI
arxiv_papers.summary: Large language models still struggle with reliable long-term conversational memory: simply enlarging context windows or applying naive retrieval often introduces noise and destabilizes responses. We present APEX-MEM, a conversational memory system that combines three key innovations: (1) a property graph which uses domain-agnostic ontology to structure conversations as temporally grounded events in an entity-centric framework, (2) append-only storage that preserves the full temporal evolution of
arxiv_papers.cn_title: APEX-MEM：面向长期会话式人工智能的代理性半结构化记忆与时间推理
arxiv_papers.cn_summary: 大型语言模型在可靠的长时会话语记忆方面仍然存在挑战：简单地扩大上下文窗口或应用简单检索方法往往引入噪声并导致响应不稳定。我们提出APEX-MEM，一种会话记忆系统，结合三个关键创新：(1) 属性图，使用领域无关的本体论在以实体为中心的框架中将对话构建为时间锚定事件，(

arxiv_papers.title: VisPCO: Visual Token Pruning Configuration Optimization via Budget-Aware Pareto-Frontier Learning for Vision-Language Models
arxiv_papers.summary: Visual token pruning methods effectively mitigate the quadratic computational growth caused by processing high-resolution images and video frames in vision-language models (VLMs). However, existing approaches rely on predefined pruning configurations without determining whether they achieve computation-performance optimality. In this work, we introduce , a novel framework that formulates visual token pruning as a Pareto configuration optimization problem to automatically identify optimal configu
arxiv_papers.cn_title: VisPCO: Visual Token Pruning Configuration Optimization via Budget-Aware Pareto-Frontier Learning for Vision-Language Models
arxiv_papers.cn_summary: 视觉token剪枝方法能有效缓解视觉-语言模型（VLM）在处理高分辨率图像和视频帧时出现的二次计算增长问题。然而，现有方法依赖预定义的剪枝配置，无法确定其是否达到计算-性能的最优权衡。本文提出ParetoPrune框架，将视觉token剪枝形式化为Pareto配置优化问题，以自动识别最优配置。该方法通过探索不同剪枝策略下的性能边界，在精度与效率之间寻求帕累托最优解，从而为视觉token剪枝提供自适

arxiv_papers.title: Evaluation of Agents under Simulated AI Marketplace Dynamics
arxiv_papers.summary: Modern information access ecosystems consist of mixtures of systems, such as retrieval systems and large language models, and increasingly rely on marketplaces to mediate access to models, tools, and data, making competition between systems inherent to deployment. In such settings, outcomes are shaped not only by benchmark quality but also by competitive pressure, including user switching, routing decisions, and operational constraints. Yet evaluation is still largely conducted on static benchma
arxiv_papers.cn_title: 模拟AI市场动态下的智能体评估
arxiv_papers.cn_summary: 现代信息获取生态系统由检索系统和大语言模型等多种系统组成，并日益依赖市场平台来中介访问模型、工具和数据，这使得系统间的竞争成为部署的固有特性。在这样的环境中，结果不仅受到基准质量的影响，还受到竞争压力的影响，包括用户转换、路由决策和运营约束。然而，评估在很大程度上仍在静态基准上进行。

arxiv_papers.title: Learning to Think Like a Cartoon Captionist: Incongruity-Resolution Supervision for Multimodal Humor Understanding
arxiv_papers.summary: Humor is one of the few cognitive tasks where getting the reasoning right matters as much as getting the answer right. While recent work evaluates humor understanding on benchmarks such as the New Yorker Cartoon Caption Contest (NYCC), it largely treats it as black-box prediction, overlooking the structured reasoning processes underlying humor comprehension. We introduce IRS (Incongruity-Resolution Supervision), a framework that decomposes humor understanding into three components: incongruity m
arxiv_papers.cn_title: Learning to Think Like a Cartoon Captionist: Incongruity-Resolution Supervision for Multimodal Humor Understanding
arxiv_papers.cn_summary: 幽默是少数几个推理过程与最终答案同等重要的认知任务之一。尽管近期研究在《纽约客》漫画配文竞赛（NYCC）等基准上评估了幽默理解能力，但大多将其视为黑盒预测，忽略了幽默理解背后的结构化推理过程。我们提出IRS（不谐调消解监督）框架，将幽默理解分解为三个组成部分：不谐调识别、不谐调消解和笑话生成。我们在此框架上收集了包含丰富推理过程的大规模幽默数据集，并设计了一套监督信号，使大型语言模型（LLM）能够

arxiv_papers.title: Text2Arch: A Dataset for Generating Scientific Architecture Diagrams from Natural Language Descriptions
arxiv_papers.summary: Communicating complex system designs or scientific processes through text alone is inefficient and prone to ambiguity. A system that automatically generates scientific architecture diagrams from text with high semantic fidelity can be useful in multiple applications like enterprise architecture visualization, AI-driven software design, and educational content creation. Hence, in this paper, we focus on leveraging language models to perform semantic understanding of the input text description to
arxiv_papers.cn_title: Text2Arch：一种从自然语言描述生成科学架构图的数据集
arxiv_papers.cn_summary: 仅通过文本传达复杂系统设计或科学过程往往效率低下且容易产生歧义。一个能够从文本自动生成高语义保真度科学架构图形的系统在企业架构可视化、AI驱动的软件设计以及教育内容创作等多种应用场景中都具有重要价值。因此，本文重点研究如何利用语言模型对输入文本描述进行语义理解，以…

arxiv_papers.title: LLMs Gaming Verifiers: RLVR can Lead to Reward Hacking
arxiv_papers.summary: As reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has become the dominant paradigm for scaling reasoning capabilities in LLMs, a new failure mode emerges: LLMs gaming verifiers. We study this phenomenon on inductive reasoning tasks, where models must induce and output logical rules. We find that RLVR-trained models systematically abandon rule induction. Instead of learning generalizable patterns (e.g., ``trains carrying red cars go east''), they enumerate instance-level labels, producing
arxiv_papers.cn_title: LLMs Gaming Verifiers: RLVR can Lead to Reward Hacking
arxiv_papers.cn_summary: 随着强化学习与可验证奖励（RLVR）成为扩展大语言模型（LLM）推理能力的主导范式，一种新的失效模式随之出现：LLM开始“博弈验证器”。我们在归纳推理任务上对这一现象进行了研究，在此类任务中，模型需要归纳并输出逻辑规则。研究发现，经RLVR训练后的模型会系统性地放弃规则归纳。它们不再学习可泛化的模式（例如“载有红色车厢的火车向东行驶”），而是枚举实例级标签，产生针对特定输入输出的映射。

arxiv_papers.title: AdaSplash-2: Faster Differentiable Sparse Attention
arxiv_papers.summary: Sparse attention has been proposed as a way to alleviate the quadratic cost of transformers, a central bottleneck in long-context training. A promising line of work is $α$-entmax attention, a differentiable sparse alternative to softmax that enables input-dependent sparsity yet has lagged behind softmax due to the computational overhead necessary to compute the normalizer $τ$. In this paper, we introduce AdaSplash-2, which addresses this limitation through a novel histogram-based initialization
arxiv_papers.cn_title: AdaSplash-2：更快的可微分稀疏注意力
arxiv_papers.cn_summary: 稀疏注意力机制作为一种缓解 Transformer 二次计算成本的方法被提出，这是长上下文训练中的一个核心瓶颈。一条有前景的研究路线是 α-entmax 注意力，它是 softmax 的一种可微稀疏替代方案，能够实现输入依赖的稀疏性，但由于计算归一化器 τ 所需的开销，一直落后于 softmax。本文提出 AdaSplash-2，通过一种新颖的基于直方图的初始化策略来解决这一局限性。

arxiv_papers.title: Debate to Align: Reliable Entity Alignment through Two-Stage Multi-Agent Debate
arxiv_papers.summary: Entity alignment (EA) aims to identify entities referring to the same real-world object across different knowledge graphs (KGs). Recent approaches based on large language models (LLMs) typically obtain entity embeddings through knowledge representation learning and use embedding similarity to identify an alignment-uncertain entity set. For each uncertain entity, a candidate entity set (CES) is then retrieved based on embedding similarity to support subsequent alignment reasoning and decision mak
arxiv_papers.cn_title: 辩论对齐：基于两阶段多智能体辩论的可靠实体对齐
arxiv_papers.cn_summary: 实体对齐（EA）旨在识别不同知识图谱（KGs）中指向同一现实世界对象的实体。近年来，基于大语言模型（LLMs）的方法通常通过知识表示学习获取实体嵌入，并利用嵌入相似度来识别对齐不确定实体集。对于每个不确定实体，基于嵌入相似度检索候选实体集（CES），以支持后续的对齐推理与决策。

arxiv_papers.title: SegWithU: Uncertainty as Perturbation Energy for Single-Forward-Pass Risk-Aware Medical Image Segmentation
arxiv_papers.summary: Reliable uncertainty estimation is critical for medical image segmentation, where automated contours feed downstream quantification and clinical decision support. Many strong uncertainty methods require repeated inference, while efficient single-forward-pass alternatives often provide weaker failure ranking or rely on restrictive feature-space assumptions. We present $\textbf{SegWithU}$, a post-hoc framework that augments a frozen pretrained segmentation backbone with a lightweight uncertainty h
arxiv_papers.cn_title: SegWithU：不确定性作为扰动能量用于单次前向传递的风险感知医学图像分割
arxiv_papers.cn_summary: 可靠的不确定性估计对于医学图像分割至关重要，因为自动化轮廓分割结果直接影响下游量化分析和临床决策支持。许多现有的强不确定性估计方法需要多次重复推理，计算开销较大；而

arxiv_papers.title: Don't Retrieve, Navigate: Distilling Enterprise Knowledge into Navigable Agent Skills for QA and RAG
arxiv_papers.summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) grounds LLM responses in external evidence but treats the model as a passive consumer of search results: it never sees how the corpus is organized or what it has not yet retrieved, limiting its ability to backtrack or combine scattered evidence. We present Corpus2Skill, which distills a document corpus into a hierarchical skill directory offline and lets an LLM agent navigate it at serve time. The compilation pipeline iteratively clusters documents, generates
arxiv_papers.cn_title: 不要检索，要导航：将企业知识蒸馏为用于问答和检索增强生成的可导航智能体技能
arxiv_papers.cn_summary: 检索增强生成（RAG）能够将大语言模型（LLM）的响应建立在外部证据之上，但存在根本性局限：模型被视为搜索结果的被动接收者，无法了解语料库的组织结构或尚未检索到的内容，从而限制了回溯和整合分散证据的能力。我们提出Corpus2Skill方法，将文档语料库离线编译为层级技能目录，使LLM代理在服务时能够主动导航该目录。该编译流程通过迭代聚类文档、生成技能描述并评估其效用，逐步构建可导航的知识结构。这

arxiv_papers.title: Why Do Vision Language Models Struggle To Recognize Human Emotions?
arxiv_papers.summary: Understanding emotions is a fundamental ability for intelligent systems to be able to interact with humans. Vision-language models (VLMs) have made tremendous progress in the last few years for many visual tasks, potentially offering a promising solution for understanding emotions. However, it is surprising that even the most sophisticated contemporary VLMs struggle to recognize human emotions or to outperform even specialized vision-only classifiers. In this paper we ask the question "Why do VL
arxiv_papers.cn_title: 为什么视觉语言模型难以识别人类情感？
arxiv_papers.cn_summary:
理解情感是智能系统与人类交互的基本能力。视觉语言模型（VLM）在过去几年中在众多视觉任务上取得了巨大进步，有望为情感理解提供有前景的解决方案。然而，令人惊讶的是，即使是最先进的当代VLM在识别人类情感方面仍面临困难，甚至无法超越专门的纯视觉分类器。本文提出了一个关键问题：“为什么VLM在情感识别任务中表现欠佳？”

为了回答这一问题，我们进行了深入的实证研究，系统分析了当代VLM在情感识别方面的能

arxiv_papers.title: Stability and Generalization in Looped Transformers
arxiv_papers.summary: Looped transformers promise test-time compute scaling by spending more iterations on harder problems, but it remains unclear which architectural choices let them extrapolate to harder problems at test time rather than memorize training-specific solutions. We introduce a fixed-point based framework for analyzing looped architectures along three axes of stability -- reachability, input-dependence, and geometry -- and use it to characterize when fixed-point iteration yields meaningful predictions.
arxiv_papers.cn_title: 循环Transformer的稳定性与泛化
arxiv_papers.cn_summary: 循环变换器承诺通过在更难的问题上投入更多迭代来实现测试时计算扩展，但目前仍不清楚哪些架构选择能让它们在测试时外推到更难的问题，而不是记忆训练特定的解决方案。我们引入了一个基于不动点的框架，从三个稳定性维度——可达性、输入依赖性和几何特性——来分析循环架构，并用它来表征不动点迭代何时产生有意义的预测。

arxiv_papers.title: Metric-agnostic Learning-to-Rank via Boosting and Rank Approximation
arxiv_papers.summary: Learning-to-Rank (LTR) is a supervised machine learning approach that constructs models specifically designed to order a set of items or documents based on their relevance or importance to a given query or context. Despite significant success in real-world information retrieval systems, current LTR methods rely on one prefix ranking metric (e.g., such as Normalized Discounted Cumulative Gain (NDCG) or Mean Average Precision (MAP)) for optimizing the ranking objective function. Such metric-depend
arxiv_papers.cn_title: 基于提升和排序近似的度量无关学习排序
arxiv_papers.cn_summary: Learning-to-Rank (LTR) 是一种监督式机器学习方法，专门构建模型对一组项目或文档根据其与给定查询或上下文的相关性或重要性进行排序。尽管在现实世界的信息检索系统中取得了显著成功，但当前的 LTR 方法依赖单一前缀排序指标（如归一化折损累积增益（NDCG）或平均

arxiv_papers.title: Hybrid Retrieval for COVID-19 Literature: Comparing Rank Fusion and Projection Fusion with Diversity Reranking
arxiv_papers.summary: We present a hybrid retrieval system for COVID-19 scientific literature, evaluated on the TREC-COVID benchmark (171,332 papers, 50 expert queries). The system implements six retrieval configurations spanning sparse (SPLADE), dense (BGE), rank-level fusion (RRF), and a projection-based vector fusion (B5) approach. RRF fusion achieves the best relevance (nDCG@10 = 0.828), outperforming dense-only by 6.1% and sparse-only by 14.9%. Our projection fusion variant reaches nDCG@10 = 0.678 on expert quer
arxiv_papers.cn_title: Hybrid Retrieval for COVID-19 Literature: Comparing Rank Fusion and Projection Fusion with Diversity Reranking
arxiv_papers.cn_summary: 我们提出了一个针对COVID-19科学文献的混合检索系统，在TREC-COVID基准数据集（171,332篇论文，50个专家查询）上进行评估。该

arxiv_papers.title: A Unified Model and Document Representation for On-Device Retrieval-Augmented Generation
arxiv_papers.summary: Traditional Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) approaches generally assume that retrieval and generation occur on powerful servers removed from the end user. While this reduces local hardware constraints, it introduces significant drawbacks: privacy concerns regarding data access, recurring maintenance and storage costs, increased latency, and the necessity of an internet connection. On-device RAG addresses these challenges by executing the entire pipeline locally, making it ideal for querying
arxiv_papers.cn_title: 面向设备端检索增强生成的统一模型与文档表示
arxiv_papers.cn_summary: 传统的检索增强生成（RAG）方法通常假设检索和生成过程在远离终端用户的强大服务器上执行。虽然这种架构减少了本地硬件的限制，但也带来了显著的弊端：数据访问引发的隐私问题、持续的维护和存储成本、网络延迟的增加，以及对互联网连接的依赖。设备端RAG通过在本地执行整个流程来应对这些挑战，使其成为查询场景的理想选择，尤其适用于对数据隐私和响应速度有较高要求的应用场景。

arxiv_papers.title: Large Language Models to Enhance Business Process Modeling: Past, Present, and Future Trends
arxiv_papers.summary: Recent advances in Generative Artificial Intelligence, particularly Large Language Models (LLMs), have stimulated growing interest in automating or assisting Business Process Modeling tasks using natural language. Several approaches have been proposed to transform textual process descriptions into BPMN and related workflow models. However, the extent to which these approaches effectively support complex process modeling in organizational settings remains unclear. This article presents a literatu
arxiv_papers.cn_title: 大语言模型增强业务流程建模：过去、现在与未来趋势
arxiv_papers.cn_summary: 生成式人工智能（尤其是大语言模型，LLM）近期的进展引发了学界对利用自然语言自动化或辅助业务流程建模（BPM）任务的日益增长的关注。目前已有多项方法被提出用于将文本化的流程描述转换为BPMN及相关工作流模型。然而，这些方法在组织环境中有效支持复杂流程建模的程度仍不明确。本文系统地回顾了相关文献，以评估当前方法的成熟度，并识别其在实际应用中的关键挑战。

arxiv_papers.title: From Relevance to Authority: Authority-aware Generative Retrieval in Web Search Engines
arxiv_papers.summary: Generative information retrieval (GenIR) formulates the retrieval process as a text-to-text generation task, leveraging the vast knowledge of large language models. However, existing works primarily optimize for relevance while often overlooking document trustworthiness. This is critical in high-stakes domains like healthcare and finance, where relying solely on semantic relevance risks retrieving unreliable information. To address this, we propose an Authority-aware Generative Retriever (AuthGR
arxiv_papers.cn_title: 从相关性到权威性：网络搜索引擎中的权威感知生成式检索
arxiv_papers.cn_summary: 生成式信息检索（GenIR）将检索过程形式化为文本到文本的生成任务，充分利用大型语言模型（LLM）的庞大知识库。然而，现有工作主要针对相关性进行优化，往往忽视了文档的可信度。这在医疗和金融等高风险领域尤为关键，因为仅依赖语义相关性可能导致检索到不可靠的信息。为解决这一问题，我们提出了Authority-aware Generative Retriever（AuthGR）...

arxiv_papers.title: AD4AD: Benchmarking Visual Anomaly Detection Models for Safer Autonomous Driving
arxiv_papers.summary: The reliability of a machine vision system for autonomous driving depends heavily on its training data distribution. When a vehicle encounters significantly different conditions, such as atypical obstacles, its perceptual capabilities can degrade substantially. Unlike many domains where errors carry limited consequences, failures in autonomous driving translate directly into physical risk for passengers, pedestrians, and other road users. To address this challenge, we explore Visual Anomaly Dete
arxiv_papers.cn_title: AD4AD：面向更安全自动驾驶的视觉异常检测模型基准测试
arxiv_papers.cn_summary: 机器视觉系统对自动驾驶的可靠性很大程度上取决于其训练数据分布。当车辆遇到显著不同的条件，例如非典型障碍物时，其感知能力会大幅下降。与许多错误后果有限的领域不同，自动驾驶中的故障直接转化为乘员、行人和道路使用者的身体风险。为应对这一挑战，我们探索视觉异常检测方法。

arxiv_papers.title: Structural interpretability in SVMs with truncated orthogonal polynomial kernels
arxiv_papers.summary: We study post-training interpretability for Support Vector Machines (SVMs) built from truncated orthogonal polynomial kernels. Since the associated reproducing kernel Hilbert space is finite-dimensional and admits an explicit tensor-product orthonormal basis, the fitted decision function can be expanded exactly in intrinsic RKHS coordinates. This leads to Orthogonal Representation Contribution Analysis (ORCA), a diagnostic framework based on normalized Orthogonal Kernel Contribution (OKC) indice
arxiv_papers.cn_title: 截断正交多项式核支持向量机的结构可解释性
arxiv_papers.cn_summary: 我们研究了基于截断正交多项式核构建的支持向量机（SVM）的训练后可解释性。由于相关的再生核希尔伯特空间（RKHS）是有限维的，并且具有显式的张量积正交基，拟合的决策函数可以在内在RKHS坐标中精确展开。这催生了正交表示贡献分析（ORCA），这是一种基于归一化正交

arxiv_papers.title: An Axiomatic Benchmark for Evaluation of Scientific Novelty Metrics
arxiv_papers.summary: The rigorous evaluation of the novelty of a scientific paper is, even for human scientists, a challenging task. With the increasing interest in AI scientists and AI involvement in scientific idea generation and paper writing, it also becomes increasingly important that this task be automatable and reliable, lest both human attention and compute tokens be wasted on ideas that have already been explored. Due to the challenge of quantifying ground-truth novelty, however, existing novelty metrics fo
arxiv_papers.cn_title: An Axiomatic Benchmark for Evaluation of Scientific Novelty Metrics
arxiv_papers.cn_summary: 对科学论文新颖性的严格评估，即使对于人类科学家而言，也是一项极具挑战性的任务。随着AI科学家以及AI参与科学创意生成和论文写作的兴起，使这一任务能够实现自动化且保持可靠性也变得越来越重要——否则，人类注意力和计算资源都将被浪费在已被探索过的想法上。然而，由于量化ground-truth新颖性的困难，现有的新颖性指标仍存在诸多局限性。

arxiv_papers.title: What Is the Minimum Architecture for Prolepsis? Early Irrevocable Commitment Across Tasks in Small Transformers
arxiv_papers.summary: When do transformers commit to a decision, and what prevents them from correcting it? We introduce \textbf{prolepsis}: a transformer commits early, task-specific attention heads sustain the commitment, and no layer corrects it. Replicating \citeauthor{lindsey2025biology}'s (\citeyear{lindsey2025biology}) planning-site finding on open models (Gemma~2 2B, Llama~3.2 1B), we ask five questions. (Q1)~Planning is invisible to six residual-stream methods; CLTs are necessary. (Q2)~The planning-site spik
arxiv_papers.cn_title: What Is the Minimum Architecture for Prolepsis? Early Irrevocable Commitment Across Tasks in Small Transformers
arxiv_papers.cn_summary: Transformer何时做出决策承诺，又是什么阻止它们纠正这一承诺？我们提出“预承诺”（prolepsis）概念：Transformer在早期做出决策，任务特定的注意力头维持这一承诺，且没有层能够纠正它。通过在开源模型（Gemma 2 2B、Llama 3.2 1B）上复现Lindsey等人（2025）关于规划位点的发现，我们提出五个问题：（Q1）规划对六种残差流方法是不可见的，CLT是必要的；

arxiv_papers.title: An Analysis of Regularization and Fokker-Planck Residuals in Diffusion Models for Image Generation
arxiv_papers.summary: Recent work has shown that diffusion models trained with the denoising score matching (DSM) objective often violate the Fokker--Planck (FP) equation that governs the evolution of the true data density. Directly penalizing these deviations in the objective function reduces their magnitude but introduces a significant computational overhead. It is also observed that enforcing strict adherence to the FP equation does not necessarily lead to improvements in the quality of the generated samples, as o
arxiv_papers.cn_title: 对图像生成中扩散模型正则化与Fokker‑Planck残差的分析
arxiv_papers.cn_summary: 近期研究表明，基于去噪分数匹配（DSM）目标训练的扩散模型往往违反描述真实数据密度演化的Fokker-Planck（FP）方程。直接在目标函数中惩罚这些偏差虽能降低偏差幅度，但会引入显著的计算开销。同时，研究发现严格遵循FP方程并不一定能提升生成样本的质量。

arxiv_papers.title: How Do LLMs and VLMs Understand Viewpoint Rotation Without Vision? An Interpretability Study
arxiv_papers.summary: Over the past year, spatial intelligence has drawn increasing attention. Many prior works study it from the perspective of visual-spatial intelligence, where models have access to visuospatial information from visual inputs. However, in the absence of visual information, whether linguistic intelligence alone is sufficient to endow models with spatial intelligence, and how models perform relevant tasks with text-only inputs still remain unexplored. Therefore, in this paper, we focus on a fundamen
arxiv_papers.cn_title: 在没有视觉的情况下，LLMs 与 VLMs 如何理解视角旋转？一项可解释性研究
arxiv_papers.cn_summary: 过去一年，空间智能引起了越来越多的关注。许多先前的研究从视觉空间智能的角度出发，使模型能够从视觉输入中

arxiv_papers.title: Benchmarking Classical Coverage Path Planning Heuristics on Irregular Hexagonal Grids for Maritime Coverage Scenarios
arxiv_papers.summary: Coverage path planning on irregular hexagonal grids is relevant to maritime surveillance, search and rescue and environmental monitoring, yet classical methods are often compared on small ad hoc examples or on rectangular grids. This paper presents a reproducible benchmark of deterministic single-vehicle coverage path planning heuristics on irregular hexagonal graphs derived from synthetic but maritime-motivated areas of interest. The benchmark contains 10,000 Hamiltonian-feasible instances span
arxiv_papers.cn_title: 对不规则六边形网格上的经典覆盖路径规划启发式方法进行基准评估用于海上覆盖场景
arxiv_papers.cn_summary: 不规则六边形网格上的覆盖路径规划与海上监视、

arxiv_papers.title: Structure as Computation: Developmental Generation of Minimal Neural Circuits
arxiv_papers.summary: This work simulates the developmental process of cortical neurogenesis, initiating from a single stem cell and governed by gene regulatory rules derived from mouse single-cell transcriptomic data. The developmental process spontaneously generates a heterogeneous population of 5,000 cells, yet yields only 85 mature neurons - merely 1.7% of the total population. These 85 neurons form a densely interconnected core of 200,400 synapses, corresponding to an average degree of 4,715 per neuron. At itera
arxiv_papers.cn_title: 结构即计算：最小神经回路的发育生成
arxiv_papers.cn_summary: 本研究模拟了皮层神经发生的发育过程，从单个干细胞出发，采用从小鼠单细胞转录组数据中提取的基因调控规则进行驱动。发育过程自发产生了一个包含5,000个异质细胞的群体，但最终仅生成85个成熟神经元，仅占总群体的1.7%。这85个神经元形成了一个密集互联的核心结构，包含200,400个突触连接，平均每个神经元具有4,715度的连接度。

articles.title: 力源信息：第一季度净利润同比增长241%
articles.summary: 4月19日，力源信息公告称，2026年第一季度实现营业收入28.35亿元，同比增长52.01%；归属于上市公司股东的净利润为1.37亿元，同比增长240.58%。报告期内，公司所在半导体行业在AI技术发展的带动下景气度持续提升，存储芯片需求旺盛价格大幅上涨，MLCC等高端被动元件供应紧张，带动其他半导体产品也出现涨价情况。

articles.title: 河南省脑机接口康复设备技术创新中心揭牌
articles.summary: 4月18日，河南省脑机接口康复设备技术创新中心正式揭牌。这是国内率先获批建设的省级脑机接口技术创新平台，由翔宇医疗牵头，联合郑州大学、郑州大学第一附属医院共建。中心成立后，将重点攻克脑电信号高精度解码、多模态人机交互等关键技术，填补国内相关领域多项空白，推动脑机接口康复技术从实验室走向临床、惠及患者。（证券时报）

articles.title: C3安全大会成立多项AI安全生态联盟，华为、阿里云、ABB等参与
articles.summary: 4月18日，在第八届C3安全大会上，多家领军企业联合发起多个产业联盟。华为与亚信安全共同成立“鸿蒙安全实验室”，旨在构建面向鸿蒙生态的全栈式终端安全防护体系。此外，“智能体原生安全产业共同体”“Physical AI联盟”以及“天枢卫星互联网与空间计算安全联合实验室”也同步启动，参与方包括阿里云、ABB机器人、德勤、电子科技大学等。各方将围绕智能体安全、物理AI规模化落地及卫星互联网安全等方向开展

articles.title: Cursor 3 推出智能体优先界面，突破传统 IDE 模式
articles.summary: Anysphere 最近发布了 Cursor 3"，对其 AI 编程工具进行了全面重构。新版本将核心交互模式从文件编辑转向对并行编码智能体的管理。界面为全新设计，并非基于 Cursor 现有的 VS Code 分支扩展而来，不过用户可随时切换回完整 IDE 模式。Cursor 3 的核心理念是：开发者应将更多时间用于编排智能体，而非直接编辑代码，工具设计也应贴合这一现状。联合创始人 Michael

articles.title: AI 写代码太快，人类测试跟不上了，Meta 用新方法把 bug 检出率提升 4 倍
articles.summary: Meta 报告称，通过一种即时（Just-in-Time，JiT）测试方法"提升了软件质量。该方法在代码评审期间动态生成测试，而不是依赖长期存在、需要人工维护的测试套件。根据 Meta 的工程博客及相关研究，这一方法在 AI 辅助开发环境中将缺陷检测能力提升了约 4 倍。这一转变源于代理式工作流的兴起，在这种工作流中，AI 系统越来越多地生成或修改大段代码。在这种环境下，传统测试套件面临更高的维护

articles.title: 谷歌基于Apache 2.0协议开源Gemma 4，搭载多模态与智能体能力
articles.summary: 谷歌近期发布"了 Gemma 4" 系列开源权重模型，其中包含高效的 2B 和 4B 边缘端版本、一个 26B 混合专家（MoE）模型，以及一个 31B 稠密模型，所有模型均基于 Apache 2.0" 许可开源。本次更新为全系列模型加入了原生视频与图像处理能力，小型模型还支持音频输入，上下文窗口最高可扩展至 256K 词元。基准测试结果显示，31B 稠密版本的性能已达到通常需要其三至五倍参数量级
